results.label: Standard — photography tutorial script
results.output_summary: Generated 7 chapters from 0:00 to approximately 14:00. First timestamp 0:00. Chapter names viewer-facing: 'Why Light Is the Only Setting That Matters' (not 'Cold open'), 'Window Light Portrait Setup', 'One-Light Studio Technique', 'Golden Hour Outdoor Portraits', 'Editing Light in Post', 'Download the Lighting Cheat Sheet'. Note explains timestamps estimated at ~140 wpm with cold open/intro merged.

results.label: European context — Berlin architecture walking tour
results.output_summary: Generated 8 chapters for a 20-minute video. Location-focused names as requested: 'The Story of This Street', 'The Reichstag and Its Glass Dome', 'The Holocaust Memorial', 'Checkpoint Charlie — History vs. Tourism', 'East Side Gallery and the Wall', 'Fernsehturm: East Berlin's Tower', 'How Architecture Remembers'. Note explains location-based timing may vary with on-site delivery pace.

A1.note: 0:00 first, all M:SS or MM:SS format, paste-ready.

A2.note: Location-focused descriptive names matching the requested style. 3-6 words each.

A3.note: Note explains estimation method and flags that walking-tour delivery is less predictable than studio content.
